title: carduus leucocephalus
intro: Carduus leucocephalus, also known as the white thistle or lady's calico, is a flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are said to promote digestive health and reduce fever. The health benefits of Carduus leucocephalus include its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps, improve liver function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Carduus leucocephalus is often used in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
